records.question: What height information corresponds to players from Slovakia born in 1987 who were drafted in round 4 or earlier with an overall rating of 123, have a CSS rank of 250, have not played any games, and have zero total 7-year time on ice?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT height_info.height_id FROM height_info
JOIN playerinfo ON height_info.height_id = playerinfo.height
WHERE playerinfo.draftround <= 4 AND playerinfo.nation = 'Slovakia' AND playerinfo.birthyear = 1987 AND playerinfo.overall = 123 AND playerinfo.gp_greater_than_0 = 'no' AND playerinfo.css_rank = 250 AND playerinfo.sum_7yr_toi = 0
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.height_id FROM height_info AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.height_id = T2.height WHERE T2.nation = 'Slovakia' AND T2.birthyear = 1987 AND T2.draftround <= 4 AND T2.overall = 123 AND T2.CSS_rank = 250 AND T2.GP_greater_than_0 = 'no' AND T2.sum_7yr_TOI = 0

records.question: What heights correspond to players who weigh exactly 92 kg, shoot right, play the position D, have not played any games, and have at least 0 sum_7yr_toi?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT height_info.height_id FROM height_info
JOIN playerinfo ON height_info.height_id = playerinfo.height
JOIN weight_info ON playerinfo.weight = weight_info.weight_id
WHERE weight_info.weight_in_kg = 92 AND playerinfo.gp_greater_than_0 = 'no' AND playerinfo.shoots = 'R' AND playerinfo.position_info = 'D' AND playerinfo.sum_7yr_toi >= 0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT T1.height
FROM PlayerInfo AS T1
INNER JOIN weight_info AS T2
  ON T1.weight = T2.weight_id
WHERE
  T2.weight_in_kg = 92 AND T1.shoots = 'R' AND T1.position_info = 'D' AND T1.GP_greater_than_0 = 'no' AND T1.sum_7yr_TOI >= 0
